你像雛菊一樣穩定、日常、自然且平衡。大多數時候沒有特別明顯的不適，但這不代表不需: Like a daisy, you're steady, everyday, natural and balanced. Most of the time you have no obvious discomfort — but that doesn't mean you don't need self-care. For you, what really shapes how you feel is rarely a single symptom; it's the daily accumulation of sleep, stress, diet, activity level and intimate care.
早上喝兩大口水（200cc）: Drink two big sips of water in the morning (200cc)
起床後補水，喚醒代謝與循環。: Rehydrating after waking wakes up your metabolism and circulation.
上完廁所後伸展 10 分鐘: Stretch for 10 minutes after using the bathroom
晨間伸展提升一天活動度與循環。: Morning stretching boosts your mobility and circulation for the day.
第一餐吃完後吃保健品: Take supplements after your first meal
餐後配合食物吸收率更高。: Taking them with food improves absorption.
每餐前先喝一杯水: Drink a glass of water before each meal
餐前補水有助消化與飽足感。: Pre-meal hydration aids digestion and satiety.
飯後不立刻坐下，先站著或慢慢走動 10 分鐘: Don't sit right after eating — stand or stroll for 10 minutes
飯後輕度活動有助血糖穩定。: Light activity after meals helps stabilize blood sugar.
把鎂單獨移到睡前: Move magnesium to bedtime on its own
鎂在睡前單獨補充有助放鬆與睡眠。: Taking magnesium alone before bed supports relaxation and sleep.
L3 整合 — 累積生活節奏: L3 Integration — building a daily rhythm
下午喝水 500cc: Drink 500cc of water in the afternoon
下午補水避免代謝下滑與疲勞。: Afternoon hydration wards off a metabolic dip and fatigue.
每天累積一段 10 分鐘的輕度走動: Accumulate a 10-minute light walk each day
輕度活動累積有助維持代謝。: Accumulated light activity helps maintain metabolism.
把益生菌移到早上空腹時吃: Move probiotics to the morning on an empty stomach
空腹補益生菌存活率較高。: Probiotics survive better when taken on an empty stomach.
分三個時間點補水：早上、下午、晚上各 500cc: Hydrate at three times of day: 500cc each morning, afternoon and evening
分段補水穩定全日水合狀態。: Spreading out hydration keeps you steadily hydrated all day.
建立每天固定的 30 分鐘身體活動時間: Set a fixed 30-minute window for physical activity each day
固定活動時間養成長期習慣。: A fixed activity time builds a lasting habit.
起床空腹（蔓越莓益生菌）、飯後（薑黃＋葉酸鐵）、睡前（鎂）: On waking, empty stomach (cranberry probiotics); after meals (turmeric + folate-iron); before bed (magnesium)
三時段分配最大化保健品吸收。: Splitting across three times maximizes supplement absorption.
你像玫瑰一樣有盛開與含苞的節奏，也帶著敏感與起伏。你的身體對週期變化比較敏銳，尤: Like a rose, you have a rhythm of blooming and budding, along with sensitivity and ups and downs. Your body is attuned to cyclical changes — especially before your period or in the luteal phase, when mood, appetite, bloating and fatigue can feel stronger. For you, self-care isn't one-size-fits-all; it's about adjusting ahead of your cycle.
每餐都要有一份蛋白質: Have a serving of protein at every meal
蛋白質穩定血糖與情緒。: Protein stabilizes blood sugar and mood.
睡前做 2 分鐘深呼吸（4-7-8）: Do 2 minutes of deep breathing before bed (4-7-8)
深呼吸啟動副交感放鬆。: Deep breathing switches on parasympathetic relaxation.
每餐先吃蛋白質和蔬菜，再吃主食: Eat protein and vegetables first, then the carbs
進食順序平緩血糖反應。: Eating in this order flattens the blood-sugar response.
睡前 30 分鐘放下手機，做一件讓自己真正放鬆的事: Put your phone down 30 minutes before bed and do something truly relaxing
減少藍光提升入睡品質。: Cutting blue light improves how well you fall asleep.
減少高糖高鹽的加工食品，用原型食物替代: Cut back on high-sugar, high-salt processed food and swap in whole foods
原型食物降低水腫與情緒波動。: Whole foods reduce bloating and mood swings.
每天找一個 5 分鐘什麼都不做的時間: Find 5 minutes a day to do absolutely nothing
短暫留白恢復神經系統。: A brief pause lets your nervous system recover.
建立穩定的飲食模式，每餐都有蛋白質、蔬菜、原型主食: Build a steady eating pattern — protein, vegetables and whole-food carbs at every meal
穩定飲食結構支持週期平衡。: A stable diet structure supports cycle balance.
建立穩定的壓力釋放習慣，找到最適合自己的放鬆方式: Build a steady stress-release habit and find the relaxation that fits you best
你像蘭花一樣對環境變化比較敏感，需要穩定以及規律來支撐。當作息混亂、壓力來襲、睡: Like an orchid, you're sensitive to environmental change and need stability and routine to thrive. When your schedule is chaotic, stress hits, sleep runs short, or your lifestyle stays irregular for too long, your menstrual rhythm can be thrown off. Your core issue isn't a single symptom — it's that your overall physiological rhythm needs to be re-examined and settled.
選定一個固定的吃午餐時間: Pick a fixed time to eat lunch
固定餐時間穩定生理時鐘。: Fixed mealtimes stabilize your body clock.
設定一個固定的「準備睡覺」提醒（比目標睡眠時間提前 30 分鐘）: Set a fixed "get ready for bed" reminder (30 minutes before your target sleep time)
睡前預備有助節律穩定。: A bedtime wind-down helps stabilize your rhythm.
午餐定時之外，早餐也不要跳過: Beyond a fixed lunch, don't skip breakfast either
規律早餐穩定整日代謝。: A regular breakfast stabilizes your metabolism all day.
睡前進行 5 分鐘睡前伸展（肩頸放鬆或腿部拉伸）: Do 5 minutes of bedtime stretching (neck-and-shoulder release or leg stretches)
睡前伸展放鬆肌肉與神經。: Bedtime stretching relaxes muscles and nerves.
三餐定時，避免因為忙碌或壓力跳過正餐後暴食: Eat three meals on schedule to avoid binge-eating after skipping meals under stress
就寢時間固定，起床時間也設成固定: Keep a fixed bedtime and a fixed wake time
固定起床時間穩定生理時鐘。: A fixed wake time stabilizes your body clock.
穩定三餐節奏，確保每餐有足夠的蛋白質支撐身體的調節: Steady your meal rhythm and ensure enough protein at each meal to support regulation
即使週末也維持大致相同的就寢和起床時間（前後不超過 1 小時）: Keep roughly the same bed and wake times even on weekends (within 1 hour)
週末不打亂生理時鐘。: Don't let weekends disrupt your body clock.
你像向日葵一樣會隨著能量消長與代謝節律而轉動。當血糖波動大、容易餓、飯後想睡、體: Like a sunflower, you turn with the ebb and flow of energy and metabolic rhythm. Big blood-sugar swings, getting hungry easily, post-meal drowsiness, weight gain or rising belly fat can signal that your body needs more support with metabolic regulation. This type may also relate to female hormone balance and a tendency toward PCOS/PMOS (polycystic ovary syndrome).
進食順序平緩餐後血糖。: Eating order flattens post-meal blood sugar.
飯後輕度活動降低血糖峰值。: Light activity after meals lowers the blood-sugar peak.
把含糖飲料換成白開水或無糖飲品: Swap sugary drinks for plain water or unsweetened beverages
減糖降低胰島素負擔。: Cutting sugar eases the burden on insulin.
每餐飯後走路 10 分鐘: Walk for 10 minutes after each meal
規律餐後走路提升胰島素敏感度。: Regular post-meal walks improve insulin sensitivity.
其中一餐的主食開始換成全穀類（糙米、燕麥、地瓜選一種）: Swap the carb in one meal for a whole grain (pick brown rice, oats or sweet potato)
全穀類延緩血糖上升。: Whole grains slow the rise in blood sugar.
每天找一段 20 分鐘的連續走路時間: Find a continuous 20-minute walk each day
連續走路提升心肺與代謝。: Continuous walking boosts cardio fitness and metabolism.
今天不吃精緻甜食（蛋糕、糖果、餅乾、含糖飲料）: No refined sweets today (cake, candy, cookies, sugary drinks)
減精緻糖維持血糖平穩。: Cutting refined sugar keeps blood sugar steady.
步數累積支持整體代謝。: Step count adds up to support overall metabolism.
😵‍💫 壓力型：大腦過度活躍、交感神經過度亢奮，明明很累卻睡不著；睡前思緒停不下: 😵‍💫 Stress type: an overactive brain and over-aroused sympathetic nervous system — exhausted but unable to sleep, with racing bedtime thoughts, anxiety, and light, dream-filled sleep. This 14-day prescription gradually builds a digital curfew to switch the parasympathetic nervous system back into relaxation mode.
睡前 15 分鐘不滑社群: No social media in the 15 minutes before bed
從最小步開始，支持睡前放鬆，降低交感神經刺激。: Starting with the smallest step supports bedtime relaxation and lowers sympathetic arousal.
L082：早晚各一包；孕婦、哺乳婦不能吃: L082: one packet morning and night; not for pregnant or breastfeeding women
手機移出床邊，睡前 30 分鐘停止高刺激內容: Move your phone away from the bed; stop high-stimulation content 30 minutes before sleep
拉開物理距離，降低睡前刺激源，支持副交感啟動。: Physical distance reduces bedtime stimulation and supports parasympathetic activation.
睡前 60 分鐘停止高刺激螢幕: Stop high-stimulation screens 60 minutes before bed
完整數位宵禁，給大腦充足降溫時間。: A full digital curfew gives your brain ample time to cool down.
持續睡前 60 分鐘數位宵禁 + 觀察體感: Keep the 60-minute bedtime digital curfew + notice how you feel
穩定維持並紀錄體感變化，讓行為內化成習慣。: Sustain it and log how you feel so the behavior becomes second nature.
🌙 節律型：生理時鐘延遲或混亂，不是睡不著，而是睡錯時間；晚睡晚起、週末補眠、作: 🌙 Rhythm type: a delayed or scrambled body clock — not unable to sleep, but sleeping at the wrong time, with late nights, late mornings, weekend catch-up sleep and an irregular schedule. This 14-day prescription gradually fixes your wake time (the strongest zeitgeber).
記錄目前實際起床時間: Record your current actual wake time
先建立基準線，看清楚目前的節律狀態。: Establish a baseline first to see your current rhythm clearly.
極黑生薑黃午餐後、B 群早上、晚安包睡前；晚安包孕婦不能吃: Black ginger-turmeric after lunch, B-complex in the morning, night packet before bed; the night packet is not for pregnant women
每天提前 15-30 分鐘調整 + 起床後立即離開床鋪: Shift 15-30 minutes earlier each day + get out of bed immediately on waking
漸進前移起床時間，並用離床動作鞏固節律訊號。: Gradually move your wake time earlier, and reinforce the rhythm signal by getting out of bed.
鎖定每日起床錨點，建立穩定節律。: Lock in a daily wake-up anchor to build a stable rhythm.
持續固定起床 + 觀察體感: Keep a fixed wake time + notice how you feel
維持節律錨點並紀錄精神狀態變化。: Maintain the rhythm anchor and log changes in your alertness.
⏰ 代謝失衡型：夜間血糖波動、低血糖反應、胰島素阻抗導致半夜醒、睡眠不穩、醒來疲: ⏰ Metabolic-imbalance type: nighttime blood-sugar swings, hypoglycemic reactions and insulin resistance cause middle-of-the-night waking, unstable sleep and waking up tired. This 14-day prescription builds a blood-sugar-steadying dinner structure (protein + vegetables + whole-food carbs).
晚餐先加入 1 份蛋白質（蛋、豆腐、雞肉、魚）: Add 1 serving of protein to dinner first (egg, tofu, chicken, fish)
從蛋白質起步，建立穩糖晚餐結構的第一塊基石。: Starting with protein lays the first cornerstone of a blood-sugar-steadying dinner.
苦瓜胜肽（孕婦忌食）/ 肉鹼 / B 群 / 甲殼素（孕婦、哺乳婦禁食）/ 鎂: Bitter-melon peptide (avoid in pregnancy) / carnitine / B-complex / chitosan (not for pregnant or breastfeeding women) / magnesium
苦瓜胜肽 每餐前 1 顆: Bitter-melon peptide — 1 capsule before each meal
加入 1-2 份蔬菜 + 一部分白飯換原型澱粉: Add 1-2 servings of vegetables + swap part of the white rice for whole-food carbs
增加纖維與低 GI 來源，支持夜間血糖穩定。: More fiber and low-GI sources support stable overnight blood sugar.
完整穩糖晚餐結構（蛋白質 + 蔬菜 + 原型澱粉）: Complete blood-sugar-steadying dinner (protein + vegetables + whole-food carbs)
三要素到位，建立完整穩糖晚餐結構。: With all three elements in place, you've built a complete blood-sugar-steadying dinner.
持續穩糖晚餐 + 觀察體感: Keep the blood-sugar-steadying dinner + notice how you feel
維持穩糖晚餐並紀錄半夜醒來與早晨狀態變化。: Maintain the dinner and log changes in night waking and morning state.
🔄 荷爾蒙波動型：荷爾蒙波動影響體溫調節、情緒與睡眠深度；常見於經前、更年期、產: 🔄 Hormone-fluctuation type: shifting hormones affect temperature regulation, mood and sleep depth — common premenstrually, in menopause and postpartum. This 14-day prescription reduces heat-waking and discomfort through bedtime environment adjustments.
調整睡衣材質（避免過厚 / 不透氣）: Adjust your sleepwear fabric (avoid too thick or non-breathable)
從穿著開始優化散熱，支持週期身體舒適入睡。: Optimizing heat release through clothing supports comfortable, cycle-friendly sleep.
活性葉酸鐵 / B 群 / 極黑生薑黃 / 魚油（孕婦、哺乳婦禁食）/ 鎂: Active folate-iron / B-complex / black ginger-turmeric / fish oil (not for pregnant or breastfeeding women) / magnesium
活性葉酸鐵 早上餐前 1 小時 1 顆: Active folate-iron — 1 capsule 1 hour before breakfast
調整棉被厚度或寢具材質 + 優化通風: Adjust duvet thickness or bedding fabric + improve ventilation
進一步管理睡眠環境溫度與通風，降低熱醒機率。: Further manage sleep-environment temperature and airflow to reduce heat-waking.
完整睡前環境調整（室溫 + 衣物 + 寢具）: Complete bedtime environment setup (room temperature + clothing + bedding)
三要素同步到位，建立完整的睡眠環境管理。: With all three elements aligned, you've built complete sleep-environment management.
持續環境管理 + 觀察體感: Keep managing the environment + notice how you feel
穩定維持睡前環境並紀錄熱醒與情緒變化。: Maintain the bedtime environment and log changes in heat-waking and mood.
